response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performers AZKi and Konomi Suzuki from the video and on-screen text. 2. Identified the song title as '最強未来衝動' from the on-screen graphics. 3. Segmented the video: Intro talk (00:00-00:56) and performance (00:56-05:04.988). 4. Attempted a search for '最強未来衝動 lyrics'. Since no official lyric source was found in the search, I provided a transcription based on the audio in the video, adjusted end time to match the video duration.
response.global_summary: The video features an introduction segment where AZKi and Konomi Suzuki announce their collaboration on an original song, followed by a live performance of the song "最強未来衝動" (Saikyou Mirai Shoudou).

scenes.description: AZKi and Konomi Suzuki introduce their new song on stage. No music is playing.
AZKi and Konomi Suzuki perform their original song '最強未来衝動' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
だから JUST FLY TO THE STAR
もっと WOW WOW
世界中で PROUDY GLOW
存在など たいきってないな
壊れても 関係ない

そっと 触れるよ 生まれたての星へ
囁きながら 願い重ねた宇宙
ほどけた軌道は 誰も知らない場所へ
微かな記憶と夢を この声に込めて
今を 過去を 未来を たどる
一瞬を 一生を この手で掴む
超BIG BANG!
ただこのまま 果てまで
溶けちゃって
切り裂かれたような衝動
抱かれて 染まって 振り切って
まだ まだ ほら また
星を 締め付ける
君と 絡まってみようか
止まらないよ 最強未来衝動
ただ ただ ただ...
剥がれ落ちてく
広がって 咲いて 駆け出して 飛んで

(Chorus)

伝いたい この淡い衝動
伝いたい この熱い衝動を
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
So, JUST FLY TO THE STAR
More, WOW WOW
PROUDY GLOW in the whole world
Existence, it's not like I've abandoned it
Even if it breaks, it doesn't matter

I'll touch the newborn star gently
The universe where I whispered wishes upon wishes
Towards a place where no one knows the untangled orbit
I'll put my faint memories and dreams into this voice
Tracing the present, the past, the future
I'll grasp the moment, a lifetime, with these hands
Super BIG BANG!
Just like this, until the end
Melting away
An impulse like being cut
Embraced, dyed, and breaking free
Still, still, look, again
Tightening the star
Shall I try to get entangled with you?
It won't stop, the strongest future impulse
Just, just, just...
Peeling off
Spreading, blooming, running out, flying

[...]

I want to convey this faint impulse
I want to convey this hot impulse
